news-korea-econ.title: Asian refiners may be the surprise winners of fresh fuels crunch
news-korea-econ.description: The situation represents a reversal of conditions faced by Asia in the early days of the US-Iran war, when the initial closure of the Hormuz cut off crude supplies, jolting processors

news-global-econ.title: Red state governors blast CNBC's 'worst states to live' list, point to booming population growth
news-global-econ.description: Republican governors slammed CNBC's quality of life rankings as biased, pointing to Census data showing massive domestic migration into their states.

news-global-econ.title: US strikes Iranian-linked oil tanker deep within Persian Gulf
news-global-econ.description: The operation so deep within the gulf, far from the Strait of Hormuz, may signal the US is widening the scope from its first blockade

news-global-econ.title: Billions in taxpayer income are leaving two iconic states — as a new economic map emerges
news-global-econ.description: All 10 counties with the largest net taxpayer losses are in California and New York, as Sun Belt migration accelerates amid high tax concerns.

news-global-econ.title: Citigroup’s Indian clients shift focus to Rupee volatility
news-global-econ.description: Citigroup reports Indian clients are adapting strategies to profit from ongoing rupee volatility amid significant depreciation against the dollar.

news-global-soc.title: China’s biggest IPO in recent years has global investors getting creative
news-global-soc.description: Unable to buy directly into ChangXin Memory Technologies Inc’s planned $9.8 billion listing because of various regulatory restrictions on participation in mainland IPOs, investors are finding backdoors

news-global-soc.title: India steps up import substitution as geopolitical tensions expose supply chain risks
news-global-soc.description: The Modi government is preparing an import substitution plan covering 100+ products to boost domestic manufacturing and reduce dependence on China
